content:
Sagus Legal is pleased to announce two significant milestones in its growth journey: the opening of its second Gurugram office at Cyber Hub, DLF Cyber City, and the appointment of Aashima Shrivastava as Partner & Head of Gurugram in its Corporate, Commercial and Compliance practice.

Aashima brings over 18 years of experience across cross-border compliance, labour and employment, corporate governance, enterprise risk management and commercial contracts, with leadership experience across leading global organisations and complex multi-jurisdictional matters.

The new Cyber Hub office further strengthens the firm’s presence in Gurugram and reinforces its commitment to delivering high-quality legal counsel through a combination of exceptional talent and strategic growth.

Together, these developments mark an important step in Sagus Legal’s expansion journey as it continues to deepen its capabilities, broaden its reach and support clients across India and beyond.

Please join us in welcoming Aashima and celebrating this exciting new chapter for the firm.

#SagusLegal #PartnerAnnouncement #NewOffice #Gurugram #CyberHub #CorporateLaw #Compliance #LawFirmGrowth
comment: Congratulations to Aashima on the new role. As firms scale across offices, maintaining consistent client experience and knowledge sharing often becomes just as important as expanding the footprint.
